Open-source crypto checkout demo Open demo dashboard

Test a crypto checkout with your own receiving address

Enter a receiving address and amount to generate one test checkout. Pay it yourself in the hosted UI or hand the same checkout to an agent over x402 on Base USDC when enabled.

Implementation examples

The default view shows a neutral checkout. Select an example below to preview a different implementation style.

Agent checkout

Agent instructions

Pending
x402 endpoint

Give your agent the endpoint and prompt below. The same checkout will be marked paid after settlement.
